description: Crisp early-season apples from Easton Community Orchard, good for lunch boxes and baking.
Mixed purple, yellow and orange carrots grown in sandy Mendip soil.
Pasteurised whole milk from Redcliffe Dairy Cooperative, bottled the morning after collection.
Naturally leavened loaf baked with organic wheat flour and a 24-hour fermentation.
Small-batch chutney with local Bramley apples, cider vinegar and warming spices.
Tender spring asparagus spears, harvested by hand and bundled the same day.
Firm Conference pears selected for school snacks and catering fruit bowls.
Sweet greenhouse tomatoes picked ripe for salads, sauces and sandwich service.
Thick live yoghurt made with whole milk and no added sugar.
Soft wholemeal rolls topped with sunflower, sesame and pumpkin seeds.
Bright jam made with late-spring strawberries and forced rhubarb.
Foraged-style cultivated wild garlic leaves for pesto, soups and restaurant prep.
Sweet strawberries from covered beds, packed for same-week delivery.
Washed new potatoes with thin skins, suitable for boiling or roasting.
Mature cheddar with a rounded sharpness, cut and wrapped by the dairy.
Olive-oil focaccia with rosemary and sea salt, suitable for sharing boards.
Earthy beetroot slices pickled in spiced vinegar for sandwiches and salads.
Tender stems of purple sprouting broccoli harvested during the cool season.
Pink rhubarb stems with a clean tart flavour for compotes and desserts.
Washed bunches of curly kale, robust enough for soups, sides and catering trays.
Fresh soft goat cheese with a mild tang, made in small batches.
Lightly sweet enriched buns with cinnamon and citrus glaze.
Slow-cooked tomato relish with a gentle chilli heat for burgers and sandwiches.
Dense blue-skinned squash with sweet orange flesh, suitable for roasting.
Juicy late-summer plums selected for fresh eating and preserves.
Tender spinach leaves washed and bagged for salads, smoothies and cooked sides.
Creamy salted butter churned from local cream.
Flexible flatbreads made with stoneground flour for wraps and mezze plates.
Soft pear preserve balanced with fresh ginger, suitable for toast or cheese boards.
Mixed heritage beans supplied in pods for restaurant specials and community meals.
Late-cropping raspberries packed carefully to reduce bruising.
Chestnut mushrooms grown indoors with consistent size for kitchen prep.
Single cream for soups, desserts and cafe service.
Sliced tin loaf with oats and local honey, baked for everyday sandwiches.
Slow-cooked red onions with balsamic vinegar for cheese boards and hot sandwiches.
Fresh broad beans in pods, best for spring menus and light salads.
Sharp blackcurrants for desserts, sauces and community preserving sessions.
Mild golden beetroot that keeps colour well when roasted or grated raw.
Cultured milk drink with a clean tang and no added flavourings.
Dense rye boule with caraway seed, suited to soup service and smoked fish plates.
Tart gooseberry compote cooked in small batches for yoghurt bowls and desserts.
Fresh pea shoots cut young for salads, sandwiches and restaurant garnish.
Pressed apple juice from mixed local orchard varieties, gently pasteurised.
Washed mixed salad leaves with peppery and mild varieties for quick service.
Lightly smoked semi-hard cheese suitable for sandwiches and grazing boards.
Boiled and baked bagels topped with sesame, poppy and sunflower seeds.
Crunchy runner beans in a mustard pickle sauce for ploughman's lunches.
Seasonal greens mix prepared for soups, sauces and community kitchens.
Deep purple damsons for jams, sauces and baked desserts.
A kitchen-prep box of leeks and onions for soups, stocks and casseroles.
Cultured buttermilk for pancakes, baking and marinades.
Open-crumb ciabatta with olives and dried herbs, baked for deli service.
Autumn pumpkin preserve with cinnamon and nutmeg for toast and desserts.
Small turnips supplied with greens attached for roasting or braising.
Sharp red gooseberries packed for preserves and restaurant dessert menus.
Geometric Romanesco heads with a nutty flavour and firm bite.
Grilling cheese made in small batches for cafes and restaurant specials.
Traybake portions made with local apples and rolled oats.
Live fermented red cabbage with caraway, packed for chilled delivery.
Strong fresh horseradish root for sauces, roast dinners and preserves.
